title: Payment: Cash (naqad)
content: Phrases: naqad, haatmai diyeko, cash ma. ERP: Cash Account Dr/Cr.

title: Payment: Bank transfer
content: Phrases: bank transfer, RTGS, NEFT, connect IPS. ERP: Bank Account.

title: Payment: Cheque
content: Record cheque number and date. Dr/Cr Bank.

title: Payment: eSewa
content: Phrases: esewa bata, QR esewa. Dr/Cr eSewa or Bank per setup.

title: Payment: Khalti
content: Phrases: khalti le tireko. Dr/Cr Khalti or Bank.

title: Payment: FonePay/QR
content: Phrases: fonepay aayo, QR scan. Dr/Cr FonePay or Bank.

title: Payment: Card/POS
content: Card swipe — settlement T+1/T+2, commission may apply.

title: Payment: Udharo (credit)
content: Creates receivable or payable — not immediate cash movement.
